includes.comment: Flyway SQL migrations — Flyway uses classpath scanning to discover migration files at startup
Spring Boot config files — loaded by the application context before AOT processing completes
PDFBox Standard 14 font AFM files — PDType1Font reads these via getResourceAsStream for glyph metrics
Hibernate ORM internal mapping files — HHH-17396: hibernate.properties and type registrations
JJWT service loader — jjwt-impl registers JwtBuilder/JwtParser via META-INF/services
PostgreSQL JDBC driver service loader registration
